name: ui-contract-review
description: Frontend UI contract and implementation review workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Define a UI contract before building and audit the result after
interface.longDescription: A frontend-focused Codex plugin with one workflow skill for both defining a clear UI contract before implementation and auditing the final UI afterward for consistency, hierarchy, copy, spacing, and interaction quality.
defaultPrompt: Define the UI contract for this frontend change
Audit this implemented UI against the intended design
Review this screen for hierarchy, spacing, copy, and interaction quality
